This Means War (2012)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $54,760,791Details
International Box Office $102,213,766
Worldwide Box Office $156,974,557
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $12,885,833
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $4,010,665
Total $16,896,498
Further financial details...

Synopsis

The world’s two foremost covert CIA operatives are trained assassins and master spies. They've saved the world on countless occasions, but these partners and best friends are about to experience the one situation way beyond their formidable skills - when they realize they're in love with the same woman. For the now-divided duo, this means war – and they’re coming at each other with an arsenal capable of bringing down a small country.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$17,405,930 (31.8% of total gross)
Legs:3.15 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:34.9% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$65,000,000 (worldwide box office is 2.4 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,189 opening theaters/3,189 max. theaters, 4.9 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $82,278,772

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: February 17th, 2012 (Wide) by 20th Century Fox
International Releases: February 16th, 2012 (Wide) (Serbia and Montenegro)
February 23rd, 2012 (Wide) (United Arab Emirates)
February 24th, 2012 (Wide) (Bulgaria)
February 29th, 2012 (Wide) (Egypt)
March 15th, 2012 (Wide) (Peru)
Video Release: May 22nd, 2012 by Fox Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for sexual content including references, some violence and action, and for language.
(Rating bulletin 2208, 2/1/2012)
Running Time: 120 minutes
Plot point: Death of a Sibling, Divorcée Romance, Love Triangle, Relationship Advice, Relationships Gone Wrong, Revenge, Romance, Secret Agent
Subgenre: Romantic Comedy
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Romantic Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Overbrook Entertainment, Robert Simonds Company, 20th Century Fox
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

The world’s two foremost covert CIA operatives are trained assassins and master spies. They've saved the world on countless occasions, but these partners and best friends are about to experience the one situation way beyond their formidable skills - when they realize they're in love with the same woman. For the now-divided duo, this means war – and they’re coming at each other with an arsenal capable of bringing down a small country.
